Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}No need to thank me.{nl}I just brought the truth to light.

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}...{p:200}But I still ended up{nl}dropping Ms. Nakaki,{p:150} sir.

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: That's the truth,{p:150} isn't it,{p:150} sir?

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}No. She had already passed away by then.{nl}It couldn't be helped.

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maya["Happy"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}{blip:2}Nick,{p:150} you were amazing!{nl}I was so moved!

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}Thanks. But things only went well{nl}because of you,{p:150} Maya.

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {sprite:Maya["Determined"]}{blip:2}Oh,{p:150} right!{nl}It's almost time for the Steel Samurai show!

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}...{p:200}Wait,{p:150} wasn't the show canceled,{p:150} sir?{nl}I mean,{p:150} since Ms. Nakaki...

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maya["Happy"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}{blip:2}Actually,{p:150} it looks like they're putting it on last minute.{nl}They say Detective Gumshoe is playing the Steel Samurai!

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: To celebrate you being cleared of all charges,{p:150} Maggey!

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}Detective Gumshoe...{p:200} I wonder if he'll be okay...{nl}Can he even fit into that suit?
{hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{fadeOutBg:600}{fadeBg:Ending,800}{p:4000}{fadeOutBg:1000}{stopBGM:true}{returnToTitle:"Congratulations, you won! See you next time!"}{sectionEnd}
